attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_GRP_ID_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.INVOICE_HOLD_FLG, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.SPLIT_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_FLG, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.RSN_CD_DEFER_IMMDTLY_FLG, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.TEMPLATE_ADJUSTMENT_NAME, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.USER_SPECIFIED_RSN_ACTION_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_HOLD_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.RSN_CD_STARTING_POINT_NUM_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.RSN_CD_RANKING_NUM_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.RSN_CD_PRIORITY_NUM_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.TOTAL_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.TOTAL_SEQUENTIAL_PRVSN_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.TOTAL_SEQUENTIAL_DFRRD_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.ACTUAL_RECLASS_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.ACTUAL_USAGE_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.ACTUAL_RELEASED_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.ACTUAL_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.REQUESTED_UNRECOGNIZED_PCT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.SOURCE_CREATED_DTM, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.SK_HOLD_DETAIL_ID_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.SRC_RPTD_VSOE_ACCNTNG_SCP_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBRSN_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.CCRM_ADJUST_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.EDW_CREATE_DTM, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.EDW_CREATE_USER, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD NCSOLH
WHERE
W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_GRP_ID_INT = NCSOLH.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_GRP_ID_INT
AND
W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_CD = NCSOLH.BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_CD
AND 
W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD = NCSOLH.BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD
AND
W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD = NCSOLH.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD
AND
W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT = NCSOLH.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT
AND
W_CCRM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NCSOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
